tools.name: ctx_circleci_pipelines
tools.description: List recent CircleCI pipelines for the current project.
tools.command: circleci pipeline list --org-slug gh/$(git remote get-url origin | sed 's|.*github.com[:/]||;s|.git$||;s|/.*||')

tools.name: ctx_circleci_jobs
tools.description: List jobs for a specific CircleCI workflow.

tools.name: ctx_circleci_artifacts
tools.description: List build artifacts for a CircleCI project build.
